---
title: "Interactive coverage map prototype"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
engine: knitr
date: today
language:
  title-block-published: "Last modified"
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(dplyr)
library(fs)
library(htmltools)
library(jsonlite)
library(sf)

input_dir <- tryCatch(
  normalizePath(dirname(knitr::current_input(dir = TRUE)), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE),
  error = function(e) normalizePath(".", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
)

project_root <- normalizePath(file.path(input_dir, ".."), winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
variants_path <- file.path(project_root, "scratch", "test_files", "simplification_variants")

if (!dir_exists(variants_path)) {
  stop(sprintf("Simplification variants directory not found: %s", variants_path))
}

coverage_file <- dir_info(variants_path, recurse = FALSE) |>
  filter(grepl("^ALS_coverage_all_.*_simplify_mapshaper_keep0\\.04\\.gpkg$", path_file(path))) |>
  arrange(desc(modification_time)) |>
  slice(1) |>
  pull(path)

coverage_web <- st_read(coverage_file, quiet = TRUE)

has_area_km2 <- "area_km2" %in% names(coverage_web)

coverage_web <- coverage_web |>
  mutate(
    YEAR = as.numeric(YEAR),
    PPM = as.numeric(PPM),
    area_km2 = if (has_area_km2) as.numeric(area_km2) else NA_real_
  ) |>
  st_transform(4326)

geojson_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".geojson")
st_write(coverage_web, geojson_file, driver = "GeoJSON", quiet = TRUE, delete_dsn = TRUE)
geojson <- paste(readLines(geojson_file, warn = FALSE, encoding = "UTF-8"), collapse = "\n")

metadata <- list(
  source_file = path_file(coverage_file),
  feature_count = nrow(coverage_web),
  simplify_method = "rmapshaper::ms_simplify",
  simplify_keep = if ("simplify_keep" %in% names(coverage_web)) unique(coverage_web$simplify_keep)[1] else NA_real_,
  year_min = min(coverage_web$YEAR, na.rm = TRUE),
  year_max = max(coverage_web$YEAR, na.rm = TRUE),
  ppm_min = min(coverage_web$PPM, na.rm = TRUE),
  ppm_max = max(coverage_web$PPM, na.rm = TRUE),
  geojson_mb = round(nchar(geojson, type = "bytes") / 1024^2, 2)
)

browsable(
  tagList(
    tags$link(
      rel = "stylesheet",
      href = "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css",
      integrity = "sha256-p4NxAoJBhIINfQ63Bf0OUSFdxxpz5yN2F1Mfd1C0g3s=",
      crossorigin = ""
    ),
    tags$script(
      src = "https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js",
      integrity = "sha256-20nQCchB9co0qIjJZRGuk2/Z9VM+kNiyxNV1lvTlZBo=",
      crossorigin = ""
    ),
    tags$style(HTML("
      .map-shell {
        margin: 1rem 0;
      }
      #coverage-map {
        width: 100%;
        height: min(78vh, 820px);
        min-height: 520px;
        border: 1px solid #d7d7d7;
      }
      .map-toolbar {
        align-items: center;
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: 0.5rem;
        margin-bottom: 0.75rem;
      }
      .map-toolbar button {
        background: #f4f4f4;
        border: 1px solid #c8c8c8;
        border-radius: 4px;
        cursor: pointer;
        font: inherit;
        padding: 0.35rem 0.65rem;
      }
      .map-toolbar button.active {
        background: #284b63;
        border-color: #284b63;
        color: white;
      }
      .map-meta {
        color: #555;
        font-size: 0.9rem;
        margin-left: auto;
      }
      .map-legend,
      .map-info {
        background: white;
        border: 1px solid #d0d0d0;
        border-radius: 4px;
        box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgb(0 0 0 / 16%);
        color: #222;
        font: 12px/1.4 system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
        padding: 0.6rem 0.7rem;
      }
      .map-legend-title,
      .map-info-title {
        font-weight: 700;
        margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
      }
      .map-legend-row {
        align-items: center;
        display: flex;
        gap: 0.45rem;
        margin: 0.15rem 0;
      }
      .map-swatch {
        display: inline-block;
        height: 0.85rem;
        width: 1.35rem;
      }
    ")),
    tags$div(
      class = "map-shell",
      tags$div(
        class = "map-toolbar",
        tags$button(class = "active", type = "button", `data-mode` = "year", "Acquisition year"),
        tags$button(type = "button", `data-mode` = "density", "Point density"),
        tags$span(
          class = "map-meta",
          sprintf(
            "%s | %s features | %.2f MB embedded GeoJSON",
            metadata$source_file,
            metadata$feature_count,
            metadata$geojson_mb
          )
        )
      ),
      tags$div(id = "coverage-map")
    ),
    tags$script(HTML(sprintf(
      "const coverageData = %s;\nconst coverageMeta = %s;",
      geojson,
      toJSON(metadata, auto_unbox = TRUE)
    ))),
    tags$script(HTML("
      const map = L.map('coverage-map', {
        minZoom: 3,
        maxZoom: 9,
        preferCanvas: true
      }).setView([58.5, -96], 3);

      L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png', {
        maxZoom: 19,
        subdomains: 'abcd',
        attribution: '&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO'
      }).addTo(map);

      let currentMode = 'year';

      const yearPalette = ['#440154', '#414487', '#2a788e', '#22a884', '#7ad151', '#fde725'];
      const densityPalette = ['#f7fbff', '#c6dbef', '#6baed6', '#2171b5', '#08306b'];

      function interpolateIndex(value, min, max, n) {
        if (value === null || value === undefined || Number.isNaN(value)) return -1;
        if (max <= min) return 0;
        return Math.max(0, Math.min(n - 1, Math.floor((value - min) / (max - min) * n)));
      }

      function featureColor(feature) {
        const p = feature.properties;
        if (currentMode === 'year') {
          const idx = interpolateIndex(Number(p.YEAR), coverageMeta.year_min, coverageMeta.year_max + 1, yearPalette.length);
          return idx < 0 ? '#bdbdbd' : yearPalette[idx];
        }
        if (currentMode === 'density') {
          const idx = interpolateIndex(Number(p.PPM), coverageMeta.ppm_min, coverageMeta.ppm_max + 0.001, densityPalette.length);
          return idx < 0 ? '#bdbdbd' : densityPalette[idx];
        }
        return '#8a8a8a';
      }

      function styleFeature(feature) {
        return {
          color: '#303030',
          fillColor: featureColor(feature),
          fillOpacity: 0.62,
          opacity: 0.85,
          weight: 0.7
        };
      }

      function formatNumber(x, digits = 0) {
        if (x === null || x === undefined || Number.isNaN(Number(x))) return 'NA';
        return Number(x).toLocaleString(undefined, {
          maximumFractionDigits: digits,
          minimumFractionDigits: digits
        });
      }

      const info = L.control({ position: 'topright' });
      info.onAdd = function() {
        this._div = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'map-info');
        this.update();
        return this._div;
      };
      info.update = function(props) {
        this._div.innerHTML = props
          ? `<div class='map-info-title'>${props.Province}</div>
             Year: ${props.YEAR ?? 'NA'}<br>
             Density: ${formatNumber(props.PPM, 1)} pts/m<sup>2</sup><br>
             Area: ${formatNumber(props.area_km2, 0)} km<sup>2</sup>`
          : `<div class='map-info-title'>Coverage</div>Click an area`;
      };
      info.addTo(map);

      function showFeatureInfo(e) {
        info.update(e.target.feature.properties);
      }

      function bindFeature(feature, layer) {
        const p = feature.properties;
        layer.bindPopup(
          `<strong>${p.Province}</strong><br>
           Year: ${p.YEAR ?? 'NA'}<br>
           Density: ${formatNumber(p.PPM, 1)} pts/m<sup>2</sup><br>
           Area: ${formatNumber(p.area_km2, 0)} km<sup>2</sup>`
        );
        layer.on({
          click: showFeatureInfo,
          popupclose: () => info.update()
        });
      }

      const coverageLayer = L.geoJSON(coverageData, {
        style: styleFeature,
        onEachFeature: bindFeature
      }).addTo(map);

      map.fitBounds(coverageLayer.getBounds(), { padding: [12, 12] });

      const legend = L.control({ position: 'bottomright' });
      legend.onAdd = function() {
        this._div = L.DomUtil.create('div', 'map-legend');
        this.update();
        return this._div;
      };
      legend.update = function() {
        if (currentMode === 'year') {
          const breaks = yearPalette.map((_, i) => {
            const start = Math.round(coverageMeta.year_min + i * (coverageMeta.year_max - coverageMeta.year_min + 1) / yearPalette.length);
            const end = Math.round(coverageMeta.year_min + (i + 1) * (coverageMeta.year_max - coverageMeta.year_min + 1) / yearPalette.length - 1);
            return `${start}${end > start ? '-' + end : ''}`;
          });
          this._div.innerHTML = `<div class='map-legend-title'>Acquisition year</div>` +
            yearPalette.map((c, i) => `<div class='map-legend-row'><span class='map-swatch' style='background:${c}'></span>${breaks[i]}</div>`).join('');
        } else if (currentMode === 'density') {
          const breaks = densityPalette.map((_, i) => {
            const start = coverageMeta.ppm_min + i * (coverageMeta.ppm_max - coverageMeta.ppm_min) / densityPalette.length;
            const end = coverageMeta.ppm_min + (i + 1) * (coverageMeta.ppm_max - coverageMeta.ppm_min) / densityPalette.length;
            return `${formatNumber(start, 1)}-${formatNumber(end, 1)}`;
          });
          this._div.innerHTML = `<div class='map-legend-title'>Point density</div>` +
            densityPalette.map((c, i) => `<div class='map-legend-row'><span class='map-swatch' style='background:${c}'></span>${breaks[i]}</div>`).join('');
        }
      };
      legend.addTo(map);

      document.querySelectorAll('.map-toolbar button').forEach(button => {
        button.addEventListener('click', () => {
          currentMode = button.dataset.mode;
          document.querySelectorAll('.map-toolbar button').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
          button.classList.add('active');
          coverageLayer.setStyle(styleFeature);
          legend.update();
        });
      });
    "))
  )
)
```
